headline: Guggenheim Maintains Buy on Accenture, Lowers Price Target to $275
summary: Guggenheim  analyst Jonathan Lee   maintains Accenture (NYSE:ACN) with a Buy and lowers the price target from $305 to $275.

headline: Deutsche Bank Lowers Accenture (ACN) Target as it Maintains Hold View
summary: Accenture plc (NYSE:ACN) is included among the 14 Best American Dividend Stocks to Invest in. On March 6, Deutsche Bank lowered its price recommendation on Accenture plc (NYSE:ACN) to $230 from $280. The firm reiterated a Hold rating on the shares.
